meta.title: Team — Certified Environmental Experts | BTH Expert
meta.description: Meet the BTH Expert team. Engineers and experts certified by the Algerian Ministry of Environment. Managing Director: Amine Lahmer. Based in Oran.

hero.heading: Our team
hero.subheading: BTH Expert comprises accredited engineers and specialists with in-depth mastery of the Algerian regulatory framework and international best practice in environmental studies.

members.name: Amine Lahmer
members.bio: Environmental engineer, Amine Lahmer has led BTH Expert since its founding in 2009. He oversees all studies and ensures deliverables comply with the requirements of the Ministry of Environment and Quality of Life. He specialises in environmental impact assessments and hazard studies for classified industrial establishments.

partner.heading: BTH Consult partnership
partner.description: For regional or national-scale projects, BTH Expert operates in strategic partnership with BTH Consult, strengthening the intervention capacity and expertise mobilised for each assignment.

cta.heading: Let's work together
cta.description: Contact our team to discuss your environmental project.

meta.title: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) in Algeria — BTH Expert
meta.description: Certified consultancy for environmental impact assessments (EIA) in Algeria. Reports compliant with Ministry of Environment requirements. Based in Oran.

hero.heading: Environmental Impact Assessment
hero.subheading: An EIA is the regulatory document that evaluates a project's impacts on its natural, human and socio-economic environment. It is mandatory for all projects subject to impact assessment under Algerian law.

why.heading: Who is required to submit one?
why.description: Any owner of an industrial, mining, agricultural or infrastructure project listed among the works subject to EIA is legally required to produce this study before obtaining a building or operating permit.

steps.title: Baseline site assessment
steps.description: Inventory of environmental components: physical, biological, human and landscape settings. On-site measurements and secondary data.

steps.title: Impact analysis
steps.description: Identification, qualification and ranking of direct and indirect project impacts on environmental components. Temporary and permanent impacts.

steps.title: Mitigation measures
steps.description: Definition of suppression, reduction and compensation measures for significant impacts. Each measure is costed and scheduled.

steps.title: Monitoring programme
steps.description: Environmental monitoring indicators, inspection frequency, alert thresholds and Ministry reporting procedures.

deliverable.heading: Deliverable
deliverable.description: A structured EIA report, compliant with the Algerian regulatory template, ready for submission to the Wilaya Environment Directorate and the Directorate of Industry and Mines.

cta.heading: Does your project require an EIA?
cta.description: Send us the technical details of your project. We assess the study scope and provide a quote within 48 hours.

items.title: Environmental Impact Assessment
items.description: Comprehensive evaluation of environmental impacts for industrial, mining and infrastructure projects. Report compliant with Ministry of Environment requirements.

items.title: Hazard Study
items.description: Major risk analysis for classified establishments. Accident scenarios, effect zones, prevention measures and emergency plans.

items.title: HSE Audit
items.description: Health, safety and environment compliance diagnosis. Identification of regulatory gaps and prioritised action plan.

items.title: Environmental Management Plan
items.description: Definition of mitigation and environmental monitoring measures throughout the project lifecycle.

equipe.heading: Experts recognised by the Ministry
equipe.description: Accredited engineers with deep mastery of the Algerian regulatory framework and international ISO/IEC standards. BTH Expert operates in partnership with BTH Consult for regional-scale projects.
